summary: This is a Friday sermon (Khutbah) delivered at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The sermon discusses the story of Prophet Yusuf (Joseph) in prison and uses it as a springboard to discuss important Islamic concepts including Tawheed (monotheism), trust in Allah (Tawakkul), and the balance between divine decree (Qadar) and human free will. The speaker emphasizes the danger of regret and the "what if" mentality, encouraging believers to place their trust in Allah while striving to do good deeds. The sermon includes Quranic verses, Hadith references, and practical Islamic guidance for daily life.
suggested_title: Trust in Allah and Divine Decree: A Khutbah on Yusuf and Tawakkul
